title: On A Fete At Carlton House: Fragment.
content:
By the mossy brink,
    With me the Prince shall sit and think;
    Shall muse in visioned Regency,
    Rapt in bright dreams of dawning Royalty.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Percy Bysshe Shelley, titled "On A Fete At Carlton House: Fragment.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
